(3) The respondents to an application under this rule are—


are pending, all parties to those proceedings;


Textual Amendments


F32 Rule 14.20(1) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 61 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


### [ F33 Notice to ] fathers without parental responsibility E+W


14.21. Where no proceedings have started an adoption agency or local authority may ask the [ F34 court ] for directions on the need to give a father without parental responsibility notice of the intention to place a child for adoption.


Textual Amendments


F33 Words in rule 14.21 heading substituted (6.4.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/135) , rules 1 , 21(a)


F34 Word in rule 14.21 substituted (6.4.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/135) , rules 1 , 21(b)


### Timing of applications for section 89 order E+W


14.22. An application for a section 89 order must be made within 2 years beginning with the date on which—


to which it relates was made.


### Custody of documents E+W


14.23. All documents relating to proceedings under the 2002 Act must, while they are in the custody of the court, be kept in a place of special security.


### Documents held by the court not to be inspected or copied without the court's permission E+W


14.24. Subject to the provisions of these rules, any practice direction or any direction given by the court—


### Orders E+W


14.25. —(1) An order takes effect from the date when it is made, or such later date as the court may specify.


(2) In proceedings in Wales a party may request that an order be drawn up in Welsh as well as English.

metadata.title: Part 14 — Procedure for Applications in Adoption, Placement and Related Proceedings
